title: Review: sieve-form 0.1.0 MY-OSS
notes:
Maintainer risk: HIGH — evaluate() API design mismatch (singleton Vec), three RFC 5228 conformance gaps (redirect missing, undeclared-extension not caught, silent unknown-command), a ReDoS surface via :regex lookaheads, and a semver trap in ParseError; any one of these will generate a repeating class of user issues or a security report.
S4/S6 review done. Confidence 90%: no missed bug. Least confident flag: 10p.10 (validate vs cache tree-walk may diverge on TestList nesting). Uncertainty: no test for regex/glob inside allof/anyof. Would raise confidence with targeted tests.
